text.title: Performance Testing Basics Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the perf-test-basics methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: list-hot-paths
step.action: Identify top-5 endpoints by traffic + criticality.

step.name: define-baselines
step.action: For each hot path, record p50/p95/p99 + RPS targets.

step.name: write-load-tests
step.action: Write per-endpoint script with warmup + thresholds.

step.name: profile-and-fix
step.action: Profile top hot path; fix top 3 hotspots; re-run load test.

step.name: ci-gate
step.action: Wire perf job into CI; fail PR on >10% regression.
step.decision-gate: Reject ship if perf job missing or thresholds disabled.
